description: Every scenario where MU scanning can return the wrong quantity — DB integrity, qty accuracy, weight, and edge cases

results.name: MU import: correct qty applied to session scannedQty
MU all-zero blocked: fully allocated MU does NOT use remaining qty as fallback
results.detail: Regression fix confirmed: allZero MU returns allZeroBlocked=true instead of using remaining=74
results.warning: This was the root cause of order 3513284 scanning 285 units instead of 66

results.name: MU over-scan guard: MU qty > remaining is blocked
results.detail: MU has 84 units, 74 remain — over-scan guard blocks (84 > 74). scannedQty unchanged at 10

results.name: MU pallet merge: pre-scanned items not double-counted
results.detail: After pre-scan(10) + MU(90): scannedQty=100 (expected 100), pallet qty=100

results.name: MU weight calculation uses Math.ceil (rounds UP)
MU with SKU not in order: unknownSkus returned in response
results.detail: Unknown SKUs detected: GR-UNKNOWN-SKU — server returns these in unknownSkus field, client shows warning toast

results.name: MU scan on completed session is blocked
results.detail: Session status=complete — completed sessions cannot accept new MU scans

results.name: Multiple MU scans: each MU creates a new pallet, session totals accumulate correctly
MU label DB cache (mu_labels table): stale qty warning
MU scan reopen: after session reopen, MU pallet data preserved
results.detail: After reopen: scannedQty=84, muLabel=MU-TEST-001, pallet qty=84
